# registry_organizations (Data Source)

Lists all registry organizations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "registry_organizations" "all" {}

output "org_names" {
  value = [for o in data.registry_organizations.all.organizations : o.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `search` (String) Optional search string to filter organizations.

### Read-Only

- `organizations` (Attributes List) List of organizations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--organizations))

<a id="nestedatt--organizations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `organizations`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable display name.
- `id` (String) UUID of the organization.
- `name` (String) URL-safe namespace name.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
